name: MakeConnector
description: Connects to the Make (formerly Integromat) automation platform via the REST API v2 (zone-scoped: https://{zone}.make.com/api/v2). Manages users, organizations, teams, scenarios, executions, connections, hooks (webhooks), data stores, templates, and devices using a long-lived API token (Authorization: Token <api_token> — NOT Bearer).

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.help: Generate at Make → Profile → API → Add token. Sent as 'Authorization: Token <api_token>' (NOT Bearer).

install_fields.label: Zone
install_fields.help: Your Make zone — eu1, eu2, us1, us2 (check the host in your Make URL after login). Resolves to https://{zone}.make.com/api/v2.

install_fields.label: Default Team ID
install_fields.help: Optional. The team to use when a method does not specify one — used by sync() too.

install_fields.label: Default Organization ID
install_fields.help: Optional. The organization to use when a method does not specify one.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap. Make defaults to 60 req/min.

install_fields.label: Base URL Override
install_fields.help: Override the zone-derived base URL — sandbox or proxy only.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates api_token + zone, saves the configuration, and probes /users/me to surface invalid tokens immediately.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Make API connectivity by calling GET /users/me.

apis.name: Get Current User
apis.description: GET /users/me — fetch the user behind the API token.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET /users?organizationId=… — list users in an organization.

apis.name: List Organizations
apis.description: GET /organizations — list organizations the API token can see.

apis.name: Get Organization
apis.description: GET /organizations/{id}.

apis.name: List Teams
apis.description: GET /teams?organizationId=… — list teams in an organization.

apis.name: Get Team
apis.description: GET /teams/{id}.

apis.name: List Scenarios
apis.description: GET /scenarios?teamId=… — list scenarios for a team.

apis.name: Get Scenario
apis.description: GET /scenarios/{id} — fetch a single scenario.

apis.name: Create Scenario
apis.description: POST /scenarios — create a new scenario from a blueprint.

apis.name: Update Scenario
apis.description: PATCH /scenarios/{id} — update mutable scenario fields.

apis.name: Delete Scenario
apis.description: DELETE /scenarios/{id} — permanently delete a scenario.

apis.name: Run Scenario
apis.description: POST /scenarios/{id}/run — trigger an immediate scenario run.

apis.name: Start Scenario
apis.description: POST /scenarios/{id}/start — enable the scenario.

apis.name: Stop Scenario
apis.description: POST /scenarios/{id}/stop — disable the scenario.

apis.name: List Executions
apis.description: GET /executions — list executions, optionally filtered by scenario/team.

apis.name: Get Execution
apis.description: GET /executions/{id} — fetch a single execution record.

apis.name: List Connections
apis.description: GET /connections?teamId=… — list connections for a team.

apis.name: Get Connection
apis.description: GET /connections/{id}.

apis.name: List Hooks
apis.description: GET /hooks?teamId=… — list hooks for a team.

apis.name: Get Hook
apis.description: GET /hooks/{id}.

apis.name: Create Hook
apis.description: POST /hooks — create a new webhook (or other hook type).

apis.name: Delete Hook
apis.description: DELETE /hooks/{id}.

apis.name: List Data Stores
apis.description: GET /data-stores?teamId=… — list data stores for a team.

apis.name: Get Data Store
apis.description: GET /data-stores/{id}.

apis.name: List Templates
apis.description: GET /templates — list public + team-published scenario templates.

apis.name: List Devices
apis.description: GET /devices?teamId=… — list devices the team can use.
